name: Jim's Italian Summer Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut habanero pepper in half.
2. Toss the habanero pepper in water to cook the pasta.
3. When the pasta is al dente, remove the habanero pepper and drain and rinse it in cold water to chill and remove starch.
4. Cut tomatoes into halves, lengthwise, and then into 1/2 inch slices.
5. Place Italian sausage links in boiling water and pre-cook for 10 minutes. Alternatively, grill over medium coals until cooked through or brown in a medium skillet.
6. Chill the sausage and cut into 1/2 inch rounds.
7. Place the chilled sausage rounds in a glass serving bowl.
8. Add tomatoes, onion, cheese, and pasta to the bowl.
9. Gently toss everything together.
10. Combine the remaining ingredients (vinegar, olive oil, garlic, mustard, basil, oregano, salt, pepper) in a separate small bowl.
11. Pour the dressing over the sausage mixture.
12. Mix gently.
13. Marinate for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator.
14. Stir before serving.
15. Serve cold.
